name: Jagannath Vidyalaya - Kelambakkam

itemListElement.reviewBody:
"I'm grateful to Jaganath Vidhyaalaya, Thaiyur, for providing excellent education. Thank you, Principal Mam, for your guidance and support. Your leadership has made a significant impact.

I'd also like to express my appreciation to Sugi UKG A Sec Mam. She's an outstanding teacher who has made a positive influence on my daughter's life. My daughter adores her, and I'm thankful for her dedication.

Jaganath Vidhyaalaya stands out for its exceptional education, care, and atmosphere. I highly recommend this school for its commitment to discipline, dignity, and academic excellence."

Thank you mam Mrs. Lips mallika mam, They say that teachers are the second parents and you have proven it. Thank you very much for that. We fully believe that Jagannath Vidyalaya School is an example of how well teachers do their duty. Congratulations, thank you very much.

I am a Parent of Nigarilla UKG ‘A’ Section. My daughter is going to complete her Kindergarten Journey. So this is the right time to share my experience with Jaganath Vidhyalaya School.
I really appreciate to Dr. NIDHI SHAJIL mam for maintaining school culture and standard and also I’m very impressed with Dr. NIDHI SHAJIL mam's polite speaking and humbleness.
I am writing to express my sincere thanks to LKG-A section Teachers Mrs. Sridevi mam and Mrs. Velakanni Mam, because initial they provided strong foundation to Nigarilla. Still i have remember that day, when Nigarilla studied in LKG. She won first prize for Bharathiyar competition. Mrs. Sridevi mam was overwhelmed with joy to the point of tears.
My sincere thanks to UKG ‘A’ section teachers Mrs. Suki Mam and Mrs. Shobana Mam for the incredible care and education giving to K.Nigarilla.
Seeing how much She enjoys coming to school each and everyday, and the enthusiasm with which she talks about their learning experiences i can feel and one day our daughter exclaimed she likes to come to school Sundays also.
Your ability to create a nurturing and fun learning environment, while also fostering important developmental skills, is truly remarkable. K.Nigarilla has learned so much this year, I know this foundation will serve them well as they continue their education.

Thank you for your patience, Kindness, and positive energy throughout the year.

Thanks & Regards
Subha R.
My daughter studying LKG,shaped up very well. KG teachers were too much supportive and sharing feedback time to time.Special thanks to Lips mallika mam,Vincy mam and Viji mam.

My son is currently studying in the UKG class at Jagannath Vidyalaya CBSE School, and I am extremely happy with his progress. It’s wonderful to see him open up and share everything he learns in his classroom. A huge thank you to his class teacher, Mrs. Suki (UKG- A), for her constant encouragement and support. Her innovative teaching methods make learning enjoyable and engaging, which truly helps in developing young minds. I am grateful for the positive learning environment at this school and the care they take in nurturing every child.
KG teachers are taking care of kids very well.

I am really happy to say, one of the greatest school to focusing both education and students growth. The Principal Dr. Nidhi Shajil, piller of this school, creating good friendly environment and focusing on students education and discipline.

Special thanks to my daughter class teacher Mrs. Suki Srinivasan (UKG A), the way of teaching and caring the childrens and understands their needs. Creating positive mind and encouraging the childrens to participate in extra curricular activities and supportive teacher.

I am extremely happy with the learning environment at Jagannath Vidyalaya CBSE School, Kelambakkam. The school provides a nurturing atmosphere that fosters both academic and personal growth. The principal, Dr. Nidhi Shajil, leads with great vision and ensures that every child receives the best education in a disciplined yet friendly environment.

A special mention to my daughter’s class teacher, Mrs. Suki (UKG - A), who is patient, dedicated, and always encouraging. Her innovative teaching methods make learning enjoyable and engaging for young minds.

Overall, I truly appreciate the school’s commitment to holistic development, safety, and quality education. I highly recommend Jagannath Vidyalaya to parents seeking a well-rounded education for their children.

Jaganath vidhyalaya cbse school has recently conducted their annual day.. It was a fantabulous effort by the management and the staffs to bring out a grand event in a very short period of time. Stage decoration and the light settings stole the show. Kid's Makeup & costumes were perfectly done😍 kudos to more such inovative events👏👏

"Dear Principal Mam, by Almighty God's grace the annual day program has become a successful one. *We JVSS UNDER THE GUIDANCE OF OUR PRINCIPAL MA'AM NAILED IT.* I wanted to personally congratulate you on the grand success of our annual day program. Your tireless efforts, guidance, and vision made the event truly unforgettable. The way you brought our students, teachers, and staff together was remarkable. Deep gratitude for the opportunities given for me and the appreciation ❤️Thank you for all that you do for our school community. We're lucky to have you as our principal.
Proud JVSSian

Thank you 🙏 😊 ❤️🩷💜💚
